headline: Citizens Invests in Massachusetts Communities by Strengthening the Workforce from the Ground Up
summary: BOSTON, May 13, 2026--Citizens today announced a series of community investments across Massachusetts focused on strengthening the workforce, beginning with early childhood education and extending to financial empowerment, small business growth, and affordable housing. The effort reflects the bank’s long-term approach to supporting families, stabilizing communities, and expanding economic opportunity across the Commonwealth.
